title: elatostema sinense var. sinense
intro: Elatostema sinense var. sinense, also known as Chinese creeping thyme or Chinese water spinach, is a type of flowering plant in the family Urticaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. Elatostema sinense var. sinense is believed to have health benefits such as lowering blood pressure, reducing inflammation, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
